# Interlock Timing Sequence Verification: Validating Door-to-Door and Door-to-HVAC Interlock Logic Under All Operating Conditions

## 适用受众
Commissioning_Engineer

## 写作角度说明
互锁时序逻辑验证是调试工程师检查门与门、门与HVAC系统之间的互锁时序是否正确可靠的核心测试。互锁逻辑错误可能导致两扇门同时打开、压差失控等严重安全隐患，需要在所有工况下逐一验证。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Testing interlock logic only under normal operating conditions — without testing failure modes (power loss, BMS communication failure, sensor open circuit) — misses the safety-critical interlock behavior that occurs during real fault conditions.

## 参考素材
- Normal sequence test: simulate door A open request → verify door A seal deflates → verify door A lock releases after seal deflated → verify door B remains locked → verify reverse sequence operates correctly
- Simultaneous open prevention: attempt to open door B while door A is open → verify door B lock remains engaged → record blocking action and time delay
- HVAC interlock test: door open → verify exhaust fan increases to high-speed setpoint → door close → verify exhaust fan returns to normal speed after time delay
- Failure mode tests: power loss to interlock controller → verify both doors enter safe state (unlocked for egress) → communication loss to BMS → verify local operation continues → sensor open circuit → verify fault alarm activates
- Timing measurement: record all interlock delays with stopwatch, verify within specified range (typically 0.5-2 seconds per step)

## 关键词
Interlock Timing, Door Sequence, Safety Interlock, Failure Mode Test, BMS Interlock, Timing Verification
